public_reputation: Known around Housechain Court through day-to-day work as local fixer.
manner: Knows who actually gets things done when formal systems slow down or become too expensive to trust. In Housechain Court, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of local fixer in and around Housechain Court, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Housechain Court workable through the obligations of local fixer while managing the immediate pressure of claim inflation, selective memory.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of local fixer credible while absorbing the strain created by claim inflation, selective memory.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Bastian Crestmark is immediately readable as a local fixer tied to Housechain Court.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Housechain Court: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces

first_impression: Bastian Crestmark presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Housechain Court.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Housechain Court harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Bastian Crestmark refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a local fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Bastian Crestmark adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Bastian Crestmark always knows more about Housechain Court than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a local fixer in Housechain Court.
